data.title: Jack Daniel's And Old Forester Parent Brown-Forman Stock Soars Thursday - Here's Why
data.description: Brown-Forman beats Q2 earnings estimates, but reports a 4% slump in gross profit; raises dividend and updates FY25 outlook.

data.title: American Eagle Outfitters Stock Plunges: What's Going On?
data.description: American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. (NYSE: AEO) shares are trading lower Thursday. The company reported mixed third-quarter earnings and provided weak guidance for the holiday season. There has also been some analyst updates. Here's what you need to know.
